title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Zerodha

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Zerodha
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Zerodha in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zerodha:
Zerodha is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha!
